label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Today is September 9, 1909, and I need to find the date 24 hours later. Hmm, 24 hours later would just be the next day, right? Because a day has 24 hours. So if today is the 9th, then adding one day would make it the 10th. So the month is September, which is 09. The day would be 10. And the year is still 1909 because September has 30 days, so adding one day doesn't take us into a new month or year. Wait, let me confirm that. September has 30 days, so September 9 plus one day is September 10. Yeah, that makes sense. So the date 24 hours later would be September 10, 1909. Looking at the options, the first one is 09/10/1909, which is option A. Let me check the other options just to be sure. Option B is September 24, which is way later.
